full_text:
Mao Hui 毛暉
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Mao Hui (毛暉). Fled to Zang Ba when Lü Bu fell and Zang Ba got him out of trouble. Mao Hui was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and Lu Bu.
